deleteAllConfirm: This will permanently delete your companion and all progress. Are you sure?

speciesSelect.title: Who will join you?
speciesSelect.subtitle: Each companion follows a unique path of growth

zephyr.name: Zephyr
zephyr.description: A breath of sky that teaches the rhythm of letting go. Its gentle pulse mirrors the calm of a slow, deep breath. Grows from a quiet puff into the vast, peaceful horizon.

kova.name: Kova
kova.description: A stone spirit rooted in the wisdom of the earth. Calm, stable, and always present. Grows from a smooth pebble into an ancient stone with living memory.

luma.name: Luma
luma.description: A light that refuses to go out, growing warmer with every moment of connection. Grows from a tiny ember into a brilliant aurora of warmth.

maru.name: Maru
maru.description: A ring spirit that spins quietly at the center of the storm. Its slow cycles teach that all feelings pass. Grows from a pearl into a cosmos of rings.
